name: Raccoon on a boat
short_description: Get unforgettable photos at the ultimate eco-learning park, Raccoons on a Boat. A boat ride at night is always fun.
detailed_description:
Raccoon on a Boat is the best ecological park in the region.
Many creatures live in a pristine environment.

Although hands-on learning and photography are by appointment only,
You are the exception.
Because you are one of a kind.
Hop on a boat today.



Explore the valley by boat, splashing through rapids and navigating through lush forests.
And snap a photo of a nocturnal raccoon.
If you see something strange, snap a photo.
Remember these moments forever.

Who are you, on a boat in the middle of the night, exploring an ecological park?



When all is said and done, you'll have a comic book that tells the story behind "Raccoon on a Boat.
What was going on in this place?

Lanterns and bugs, darkness and water, something wild awaits you.

If you don't manage to capture them all in one trip, you can always try again.
Will you be able to find all the raccoons?
